---
title: "Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle"
subtitle: "5,837 posts where this was the primary topic."
anchor-sections: false
---

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<style>
  h1 { border-bottom-color: #5E7A4C !important; }
</style>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [7, 39, 70, 347, 937, 1103, 650, 270, 131, 175, 363, 423, 11, 194, 390, 492, 182, 53],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#5E7A4C" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>twitter com</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>president trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>http bit</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>pic twitter</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>rumble com</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>https rumble</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>http www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>trump national</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>trump tower</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>live president</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>president donald</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>golf course</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#5E7A4C'>new york</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="post-stream"><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2010"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2010.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 30, 2010  14:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Spent a beautiful weekend golfing at Trump National Golf Club Westchester and Trump National Golf Club Bedminster.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_22551244200" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/22551244200" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 13, 2023  20:36</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">A great day at Trump Bedminster!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110884226009740718" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110884226009740718" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 15, 2014  05:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The brand new Blue Monster Golf Course at Trump National Doral is doing fantastic business. Also</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_434652087470022656" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/434652087470022656" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 23, 2023  18:48</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">The Grand Ballroom of Mar-a-Lago, the greatest of them all!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109915546530742739" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109915546530742739" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2012"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 20, 2012  13:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Played the Trump International Golf Club in Palm Beach last weekend. One of the best golf courses in the country. Perfect weather.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_182178091500707840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/182178091500707840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 22, 2013  10:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Spent the weekend in LA checking out Trump National Golf Club on the Pacific Ocean. An amazing place! http://bit.ly/CIGH6&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_326364555229949952" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/326364555229949952" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 15, 2023  04:40</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Thank you to everyone who came out last night—to Trump National Golf Club, Bedminster! ICYMI—FULL REMARKS HERE: https://rumble.com/v2tyd8m-live-president-trump-delivers-remarks-in-bedminster-nj.html</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110546389766786851" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110546389766786851" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 02, 2014  17:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I am at Trump National Doral in Miami as the best golfers in the World start arriving for the World Golf Championship (Cadillac). A big week&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_440264638077628416" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/440264638077628416" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 08, 2014  21:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ nicolabarbolini: Playing at Trump Los Angeles! Amazing round of golf in the best course in west coast! Unforgettable ocean view!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_520035797580648448" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/520035797580648448" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 05, 2014  12:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ therefornone just home from great couple of days at @ TrumpTurnberry. Tremendous golf course</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_507942165264470016" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/507942165264470016" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 10, 2024  01:49</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">A beautiful evening at TRUMP NATIONAL DORAL, MIAMI. Thank you! https://www.DonaldJTrump.com</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112759679523231057" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112759679523231057" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 15, 2013  21:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ doublet7: @ realDonaldTrump Every day at Bedminster national is a day in golf heaven. Thx for a great membership experience Mr Trump!&#x27; NICE&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_334859060157505537" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/334859060157505537" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 13, 2025  23:51</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">In between meetings and phone calls, it was a Great Honor to win the Member-Member Championship, at Trump National, Bedminster (Gross, no strokes), with Tommy Urciuoli as my partner. The many other competitors were not only great Golfers, but also terrific people!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114848608158429419" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114848608158429419" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2019  02:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great morning at Trump National Golf Club in Jupiter</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1091760712756744192" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1091760712756744192" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 19, 2014  16:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ RonKarkoviceFF Trump Tower in Chicago is a masterpiece that completes a gorgeous skyline!&#x27; Thanks!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_479732091223941121" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/479732091223941121" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 23, 2015  22:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Crowd was amazing tonight at Trump National Doral in Miami. Love and excitement in the ballroom. Tomorrow at noon in Jacksonville!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_657761817196933121" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/657761817196933121" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2015  15:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Looking forward to next week‚Äôs unveiling of the Red Tiger @ TrumpDoral. An 18 hole masterpiece w/two island greens http://www.trumpgolfdoral.com/&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552573386644553730" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552573386644553730" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 18, 2024  01:45</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Eric Trump at Trump National, Westchester, getting ready to welcome our friend, Bryson DeChambeau, to a celebration of his incredible victory in The United States Open. He finished off his WIN with one of the greatest shots ever made!!! DJT</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112635094810796813" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112635094810796813" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 17, 2014  20:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ pandoerra: @ realDonaldTrump had an incredible day at Trump Bedminster. Bravo Mr. Trump&#x27; Great.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_489940191885271041" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/489940191885271041" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 17, 2023  21:47</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Just spent a fortune on the “Blue Monster” at Trump National Doral, in Miami. Truly one of the greatest golf courses anywhere in the World. Thousands of specimen Coconut Palm Trees recently added. Big, bold, and long, it is one of the touring pros favorite courses to play. LIV Championship all signed for the Fall. Just left Doral —The whole place is AMAZING!</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_109882274095664396" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/109882274095664396" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2012"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 12, 2012  11:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The amazing Trump National Golf Club Los Angeles. http://fb.me/1Inc2ClRm&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_278918855550726144" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/278918855550726144" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 20, 2015  10:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Trump National Golf Club Los Angeles fronts the Pacific Ocean and has an 18 hole Pete Dye course. Beautiful! http://www.trump.com/Golf_Clubs/Los_Angeles/Los_Angeles.asp ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_578940178204647424" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/578940178204647424" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 25, 2014  10:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congrats @ TrumpChicago for being named #3 Best Business Hotel in Chicago in @ TravlandLeisure&#x27;s 2014 World&#x27;s Best http://goo.gl/vswyBU .&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_537283926751203328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/537283926751203328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 01, 2013  02:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ TullThomas: @ realDonaldTrump Trump Soho the best looking building in the country. No other building in the world looks like it.&#x27; Thanks!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_362836958126411776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/362836958126411776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 16, 2015  13:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Trump National Golf Club Bedminster</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_577538338586038272" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/577538338586038272" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 16, 2025  18:52</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">I just won the Golf Club Championship, probably my last, at Trump International Golf Club, in Palm Beach County, Florida. Such a great honor! The Awards dinner is tonight, at the Club. I want to thank the wonderful Golf Staff, and all of the many fantastic golfers, that participated in the even. Such fun!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_114173619031149739" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/114173619031149739" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 06, 2014  14:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Trump International Hotel &amp; Tower Toronto continues to receive accolades. Great city</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_441670685610758144" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/441670685610758144" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2013  11:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;While in Charlotte this weekend will visit my Trump National Golf Club on Lake Norman‚Äîa magnificent place &amp; doing really well!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_301378547229007873" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/301378547229007873" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 08, 2014  19:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you @ GolfMagazine for your fantastic review of The Blue Monster at Trump National Doral - &#x27;BEST U.S. RESORT RENOVATION&#x27; - &amp; &#x27;ALL TIME&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_542128475025723392" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/542128475025723392" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 24, 2024  21:28</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">It is my great honor to be at Trump International Golf Club in West Palm Beach tonight, AWARDS NIGHT, to receive THE CLUB CHAMPIONSHIP TROPHY &amp;amp; THE SENIOR CLUB CHAMPIONSHIP TROPHY. I WON BOTH! A large and golfing talented membership, a GREAT and difficult course, made the play very exciting. The qualifying and match play was amazing. A large and distinguished group will be there tonight. Very exciting,  thank you!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112152785553117285" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112152785553117285" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 19, 2013  13:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Via @ theobserver: &#x27;Donald Trump: Lake Norman golf course &#x27;one of the hottest places around&#x27;&#x27; http://bit.ly/ZnXJkg&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_303950823463976962" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/303950823463976962" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 09, 2015  08:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Trump Turnberry is a spectacular place--and home to four of the greatest Open Championships of all time. http://www.trump.com/Golf_Clubs/scotland/Turnberry.asp ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_608271330052599808" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/608271330052599808" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 14, 2014  21:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;. @ MattGinellaGC Have you ever seen Trump National/Bedminster or Trump International Golf links in Scotland. Both far better than Pinehurst!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_478000954080768000" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/478000954080768000" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2014  07:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Blue Monster Golf Course officially opens tomorrow at Trump National Doral with a ribbon cutting ceremony. GREAT COURSE</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_431054740240498689" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/431054740240498689" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2022"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2022.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 29, 2022  11:34</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @realDonaldTrumpJust arrived in Bedminster for the big LIV Tour Golf Tournament. Record money to winners, great excitement. Come on out on Friday, Saturday or Sunday to watch the great play by the best players!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_108730413459081988" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/108730413459081988" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 11, 2013  14:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @ IngrahamAngle: Trump Int&#x27;l Golf Club West Palm Beach is spectacular. Almost makes me wish I had time to play/learn/like golf.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_301070324886286337" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/301070324886286337" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 01, 2015  01:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ archangeljf12: @ realDonaldTrump Palm Beach is one of the greatest places in the World to Live! # TrumpPOTUS2016 # HappyNewYear&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_550549504718802944" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/550549504718802944" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 14, 2013  10:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;. @ TrumpNationalNY is NY&#x27;s best golf club. A 5 Star Diamond Award winner w/ an elite golf course &amp; top facilities http://bit.ly/bhn5fU&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_334328844582535168" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/334328844582535168" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2013"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2013.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 18, 2013  20:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@SwingTrader2012: @ realDonaldTrump I think Trump Chicago is the single most beautiful building in the world.&#x27; Thank you.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_380511541445283841" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/380511541445283841" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2014"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2014.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 12, 2014  03:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ RustyWynnewood: Great day at Trump National in Charlotte. You took a good club and made it great. Well done sir. pic.twitter.com/NeAQ8xZkgy&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_454900330833379328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/454900330833379328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div>
```


::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
